rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, September 27, 2010, line 1, PLAINTIFF HAPPENING HOUSE VENTURES, A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP'S Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees. MOTION GRANTED. rulings.Case Title: RISTEARD JOSEPH O'SUILLEABHAIN, et. al. VS. ALAC DEAN CONSTRUCTION et al
